name: cashsnap_webgl_visual_review_rules_v1
description: Visual audit rules for WebGL synthetic packages. Deterministic visual_quality acceptance is necessary but not sufficient for trainable promotion.

review_statuses.meaning: Scene, visual realism, and preview labels are acceptable for the intended candidate use.
Scene must not enter a trainable-candidate mix.
Scene shows a renderer, asset, or label issue that should be fixed before reuse.
Reviewer cannot decide from this pack; keep diagnostic-only until more evidence exists.
